Title: Rauch, Christian
Overview: Gießen medievalist art historian. Rauch's father was the medievalist literary historian Christian Rauch (1844- ). He submitted his dissertation in architectural history at the university in Kiel in 1903, on the church in Segeberg. His students included Otto Schmitt and Fritz Volbach.
Selected Bibliography: [dissertation:] Die Kirche zu Segeberg. Kiel (and published under the same title) Preetz: J. M. Hansen, 1903; [festschrift:] Festgabe für Christian Rauch. Giessen: Wilhelm Schmitz Verlag, 1960; Douai: Kultur- und kunstgeschichtliche Studien in Nordfrankreich. Heidelberg: Korpsverlagsbuchhandlung des XIV. Reservekorps, 1917.
